title: Serino 2015 peri-trunk PPS Experiment 1
citation: Serino, A., Noel, J. P., Galli, G., Canzoneri, E., Marmaroli, P., Lissek, H., & Blanke, O. (2015). Body part-centered and full body-centered peripersonal space representations. Scientific Reports, 5, 18603.
notes: Peri-trunk two-speaker looming/receding task. Timing/distance/trial-count fields are literature-derived; exact speaker crossfade is approximated by the current linear binaural renderer.

provenance.source: Scientific Reports results report D1-D6 as 5, 24, 43, 62, 81, and 100 cm.
Methods report 240 trials: multisensory D1-D6 plus baselines and catch trials by two directions and 16 repetitions.
